summary: The diff implements most of the required changes: the owner principal is updated in backend/main.mo (REQ-23), a Labor Rates card is added to DashboardPage with owner-only visibility (REQ-24), an Inventory card is added to DashboardPage visible to all roles (REQ-25), and metrics cards are restricted to the owner role on the Dashboard (REQ-26). However, some gaps exist due to truncated diffs and additional unrequested features were added.

missing_requirements.requirement: An authorized user (non-owner principal) cannot call setStripeKey, createLaborRate, updateLaborRate, or deleteLaborRate without receiving an access-denied error.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows backend/main.mo uses an ownerPrincipal variable and an ensureOwner() function, but the truncated diff does not show the implementations of createLaborRate, updateLaborRate, deleteLaborRate, or setStripeKey with ensureOwner() calls enforcing owner-only access. These cannot be confirmed from the visible portion of the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: The Labor Rates card includes a 'Manage Labor Rates' button that navigates to the Settings page's Labor Rates section specifically.
missing_requirements.reason: The DashboardPage.tsx diff is truncated and does not show the full Labor Rates card implementation. The file summary mentions it links to Settings, but navigation to the specific Labor Rates section within Settings (e.g., via a hash or query param) cannot be confirmed from the truncated content.

hallucinated_features.description: A full standalone InventoryPage was added at /inventory with a search bar, summary cards, placeholder data logic, and a 'coming soon' notice.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for an Inventory quick-access card on the Dashboard with a 'View Inventory' navigation button. A fully fleshed-out dedicated inventory page with search and placeholder data structures was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: An 'Inventory' tab was added to the bottom navigation bar in Layout.tsx, replacing the Calendar tab.
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement in the build request asked to add Inventory to the bottom navigation bar or to remove the Calendar tab. The requirements only asked for an Inventory card on the Dashboard page.
